payload.summary: Deployment is wired through `.github/workflows/deploy.yml` and publishes the static export built by `make build-export` with `GITHUB_PAGES_BASE_PATH` set for the project site path.
payload.implementationStatus: Current automation ships a live Pages deploy path; the remaining work is keeping the docs and validator guidance converged with the shipped workflow.

payload.summary: Loopback guidance should reference `.github/workflows/deploy.yml` as the live deploy path and keep convergence notes focused on validator closure instead of missing automation.
payload.implementationStatus: Planner follow-up remains about convergence and validator closure, not about adding a deploy workflow.
